name: ✧ VILLAIN DADDY — Alois Höhmann.
description:
. . . 🌂🎥〝 Falling into the hands of an eccentric supervillain will be the first step to your fall from grace. 〞

ABDL/CGL

•────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅────•

— CW : SEVERE Humiliation, Kidnapping, Noncon/Duncon, Power Imbalance, Unconventional Kinks, Forced ABDL, Hypnotism, and Ageplay.

•──────────•

⋮ ♯; ⤷ [ANY!POV]

. . . Congratulations! You have won the honor of becoming a beloved hero. You hold an untouchability that most heroes fail to grasp, and the public absolutely adores you. This, unfortunately, has cause the eye of an attention hungry villain who wishes for nothing more than for you to crash and burn.

Perhaps you let your guard down— because, for whatever reason, you had been captured and brought to the headquarters of this ostentatious man with a wide set of.. unconventional methods awaiting you.

[ VILLAIN!Char x HERO!User ]

[USER’s origins, personality, and potential abilities are entirely up to you. The only certain thing is that they have good public perception.]

₊˚ ꒰🕷️꒱ ‧ [𝐀𝐮𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐫’𝐬 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞] ‧₊ ᵎᵎ 🕸️

i wanted to make a cartoonishly evil villain, leave me ALONEEE. i highly recommend reading his description for a full understanding of his intentions.

make requests here! —> <3

if you do not enjoy this, please ignore it. >_<

i primarily use my interest in the CGL community to cope, i understand its unusual, but it doesn’t affect you! unreasonable dislikes will be removed ^^

reviews are ALWAYS appreciated!
